title: SketchFittedSplines Object
description: The collection of fitted splines in a sketch. This provides access to the existing fitted splines and supports the methods to create new fitted splines.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Creates a new fitted spline through the specified points.

methods.name: addByNurbsCurve
methods.description: **RETIRED** Creates a new fitted spline using the input NurbsCurve3D to define the shape. Fit points are created to create a curve that exactly matches the input curve.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: item
methods.description: Function that returns the specified sketch fitted spline using an index into the collection.

properties.name: count
properties.description: Returns the number of fitted splines in the sketch.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

related_samples.name: Sketch spline through points creation and relative functions API Sample
related_samples.description: Create a sketch spline with points and use some operations for spline tangent handle & curvature handle.

add.title: SketchFittedSplines.add Method
add.description: Creates a new fitted spline through the specified points.
add.return_description: Returns the newly created SketchFittedSpline object if the creation was successful or null if it failed.

parameters.name: fitPoints
parameters.description: A collection of points that the curve will fit through. They can be any combination of existing SketchPoint or Point3D objects.

related_samples.name: Sketch spline through points creation and relative functions API Sample
related_samples.description: Create a sketch spline with points and use some operations for spline tangent handle & curvature handle.

addByNurbsCurve.title: SketchFittedSplines.addByNurbsCurve Method
addByNurbsCurve.description: This function is retired. See more information in the 'Remarks' section below. Creates a new fitted spline using the input NurbsCurve3D to define the shape. Fit points are created to create a curve that exactly matches the input curve. Remarks
addByNurbsCurve.return_description: Returns the newly created SketchFittedSpline object if the creation was successful or null if it failed.

parameters.name: nurbsCurve
parameters.description: A NurbsCurve3D object that defines a valid NURBS curve.

classType.title: SketchFittedSplines.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

item.title: SketchFittedSplines.item Method
item.description: Function that returns the specified sketch fitted spline using an index into the collection.
item.return_description: Returns the specified item or null if an invalid index was specified.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The index of the item within the collection to return. The first item in the collection has an index of 0.

count.title: SketchFittedSplines.count Property
count.description: Returns the number of fitted splines in the sketch.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = sketchFittedSplines_var.count

isValid.title: SketchFittedSplines.isValid Property
isValid.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = sketchFittedSplines_var.isValid

objectType.title: SketchFittedSplines.objectType Property
objectType.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object. It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

syntax.python:

propertyValue = sketchFittedSplines_var.objectType
